specs.title: go back to import view with escape key (autoskip on)
go back to import view with escape key (autoskip off)
should not skip on confirm button click

should toggle autoskip on on keybind press
should skip on confirm button click
should toggle autoskip off on keybind press
should autoskip to classify when all images are confirmed
should delete the image on ctrl-delete and go to the next image
should delete the image via delete button and go to the next image
should mark the image as confirmed if image was untouched
dragging outside the crop surface cancels
should mark the image as confirmed if image was untouched
should mark the image as confirmed if image was untouched
should zoom in and out with the mouse wheel
should zoom in and out with the keyboard
